Sign in
Try Calendar for work
Shareable online calendar
Spend less time planning and more time doing with an AI-powered calendar.
Try Calendar for work
Sign in
Shareable online calendar
Spend less time planning and more time doing with an AI-powered calendar.
Sign in
Try Calendar for work
Schedule
Appointment booking
Organize
Collaborate
Productivity
FAQs
Premium feature
To get
Gemini for Google Workspace
, you need an existing Workspace plan.
Schedule events faster with Gemini in Gmail
Help me schedule in Gmail, Gemini finds the best meeting times based on your email context and Google Calendar — so you can share options and book faster, all in one tap.
Premium feature
To get
Gemini for Google Workspace
, you need an existing Workspace plan.
Add events from email with a click
When Gemini detects event details in an email, simply click the "Add to Calendar" button to save it to Calendar. Your event details are accurately captured, right from Gmail.
Built-in appointment booking
Skip the back-and-forth and set up an appointment booking page directly in Calendar — no other apps, extensions, or downloads needed. Let clients, customers, and partners book time with you instantly.
Premium feature
This feature is available on
Gemini add-on to Workspace plans
and
Google One Premium plan
.
Plus, you can set up multiple booking pages, connect a Stripe account to collect payment, manage automatic email reminders, and more.
Learn more
Your schedule, organized  across Workspace
Manage your day with integrations across Tasks, Gmail, and Meet.
Track tasks in Calendar
Add a date and time to any task, and it automatically appears on your Calendar.
Learn more about Google Tasks
Sync events from Gmail
Flights, hotels, and restaurant reservations in your inbox are automatically added to Calendar.
Learn more about Gmail
Collaborate with Meet
Easily add Google Meet video conferencing to an event to connect virtually.
Learn more about Google Meet
Track tasks in Calendar
Add a date and time to any task, and it automatically appears on your Calendar.
Learn more about Google Tasks
Sync events from Gmail
Flights, hotels, and restaurant reservations in your inbox are automatically added to Calendar.
Learn more about Gmail
Collaborate with Meet
Easily add Google Meet video conferencing to an event to connect virtually.
Learn more about Google Meet
Team collaboration made effortless
Share calendars with others
Shared calendars keep everyone in sync and make it easy to view times that work across schedules.
Attach files to events
Consolidate details in one place by attaching relevant agendas, pre-reads, and documents directly to your event.
Set working location and hours
Let your teammates know where you'll be working from and what your working hours are.
Share calendars with others
Shared calendars keep everyone in sync and make it easy to view times that work across schedules.
Attach files to events
Consolidate details in one place by attaching relevant agendas, pre-reads, and documents directly to your event.
Set working location and hours
Let your teammates know where you'll be working from and what your working hours are.
Maximize your productivity
Track how you spend time
Time Insights help you analyze your schedule, showing you how you spend your time and who you spend it with.
Block out distractions
Schedule focus time to silence notifications and auto-decline meetings, so you have uninterrupted time for deep work.
Stay organized with multiple calendars
Create separate calendars for work, personal, and other events, then view them all in one place for a complete schedule overview.
Customize your view
Color-code your calendar and events to stay visually organized. Plus, personalize your Calendar view with dark, light, or device default themes to match your preference.
Curious about Google Calendar?
Take a look at our FAQ to learn more.
Expand all
You can access Google Calendar on the web, through mobile apps for
Android
and
iOS
, and on your
Wear OS
or
Apple Watch
devices. Your calendar is automatically and seamlessly synced across all these platforms.
Yes. Calendar migration options are available for many types of calendars, including both Microsoft® and IBM®. For more information on the tools available for data migrations into Google Workspace, see
Migrate your organization’s data to Google Workspace
. For information on allowing Microsoft Exchange and Google Calendar to work together, examine the
Calendar Interop
to

All plans billed monthly
All prices $USD
Starter, Standard, and Plus plans can be purchased for a maximum of 300 users. There is no minimum or maximum user limit for Enterprise plans. Google Workspace customers may have access to additional features for a limited promotional period.
*Google Workspace provides flexible pooled storage per user that is shared across the organization. Business Starter includes 30 GB pooled storage per user, Business Standard includes 2 TB, Business Plus and Enterprise Plus include 5 TB. Visit our Help Center to learn more about getting additional storage for your organization.
**Offer available to new Google Workspace customers only. This introductory price is only available for the first 20 users added, for 12 months. Standard pricing will apply to all users after 12 months. Actual price per user may vary by up to ~0.01% due to rounding. Final price will be shown before completing sign-up.

Sign in
Try Calendar for work
Shareable online calendar
Spend less time planning and more time doing with an AI-powered calendar.
Try Calendar for work
Sign in
Shareable online calendar
Spend less time planning and more time doing with an AI-powered calendar.
Sign in
Try Calendar for work
Schedule
Appointment booking
Organize
Collaborate
Productivity
FAQs
Premium feature
To get
Gemini for Google Workspace
, you need an existing Workspace plan.
Schedule events faster with Gemini in Gmail
Help me schedule in Gmail, Gemini finds the best meeting times based on your email context and Google Calendar — so you can share options and book faster, all in one tap.
Premium feature
To get
Gemini for Google Workspace
, you need an existing Workspace plan.
Add events from email with a click
When Gemini detects event details in an email, simply click the "Add to Calendar" button to save it to Calendar. Your event details are accurately captured, right from Gmail.
Built-in appointment booking
Skip the back-and-forth and set up an appointment booking page directly in Calendar — no other apps, extensions, or downloads needed. Let clients, customers, and partners book time with you instantly.
Premium feature
This feature is available on
Gemini add-on to Workspace plans
and
Google One Premium plan
.
Plus, you can set up multiple booking pages, connect a Stripe account to collect payment, manage automatic email reminders, and more.
Learn more
Your schedule, organized  across Workspace
Manage your day with integrations across Tasks, Gmail, and Meet.
Track tasks in Calendar
Add a date and time to any task, and it automatically appears on your Calendar.
Learn more about Google Tasks
Sync events from Gmail
Flights, hotels, and restaurant reservations in your inbox are automatically added to Calendar.
Learn more about Gmail
Collaborate with Meet
Easily add Google Meet video conferencing to an event to connect virtually.
Learn more about Google Meet
Track tasks in Calendar
Add a date and time to any task, and it automatically appears on your Calendar.
Learn more about Google Tasks
Sync events from Gmail
Flights, hotels, and restaurant reservations in your inbox are automatically added to Calendar.
Learn more about Gmail
Collaborate with Meet
Easily add Google Meet video conferencing to an event to connect virtually.
Learn more about Google Meet
Team collaboration made effortless
Share calendars with others
Shared calendars keep everyone in sync and make it easy to view times that work across schedules.
Attach files to events
Consolidate details in one place by attaching relevant agendas, pre-reads, and documents directly to your event.
Set working location and hours
Let your teammates know where you'll be working from and what your working hours are.
Share calendars with others
Shared calendars keep everyone in sync and make it easy to view times that work across schedules.
Attach files to events
Consolidate details in one place by attaching relevant agendas, pre-reads, and documents directly to your event.
Set working location and hours
Let your teammates know where you'll be working from and what your working hours are.
Maximize your productivity
Track how you spend time
Time Insights help you analyze your schedule, showing you how you spend your time and who you spend it with.
Block out distractions
Schedule focus time to silence notifications and auto-decline meetings, so you have uninterrupted time for deep work.
Stay organized with multiple calendars
Create separate calendars for work, personal, and other events, then view them all in one place for a complete schedule overview.
Customize your view
Color-code your calendar and events to stay visually organized. Plus, personalize your Calendar view with dark, light, or device default themes to match your preference.
Curious about Google Calendar?
Take a look at our FAQ to learn more.
Expand all
You can access Google Calendar on the web, through mobile apps for
Android
and
iOS
, and on your
Wear OS
or
Apple Watch
devices. Your calendar is automatically and seamlessly synced across all these platforms.
Yes. Calendar migration options are available for many types of calendars, including both Microsoft® and IBM®. For more information on the tools available for data migrations into Google Workspace, see
Migrate your organization’s data to Google Workspace
. For information on allowing Microsoft Exchange and Google Calendar to work together, examine the
Calendar Interop
to

Google Calendar Unexpectedly Leaks Private Information

analysis.name: Google Calendar
analysis.value_proposition: A deeply integrated, AI-assisted calendar that connects scheduling, video conferencing, tasks, and the full Google Workspace suite for individuals and teams of all sizes.
analysis.ideal_customer: Teams and individuals already in the Google ecosystem who need shared calendars, meeting scheduling, and AI-assisted time management tightly integrated with Gmail, Meet, and Drive.

features.name: shared calendars
features.description: Share calendars with individuals or groups with configurable access levels
features.evidence_quote: Shared calendars

features.name: event creation
features.description: Create, edit, and manage calendar events with details, attachments, and guests
features.evidence_quote: Create events in Calendar or Gmail

features.name: event invitations
features.description: Send invitations to guests and manage RSVP responses
features.evidence_quote: Respond to event invitations

features.name: rsvp tracking
features.description: Track acceptance, decline, and maybe responses from all event attendees
features.evidence_quote: Track responses to your event

features.name: appointment scheduling
features.description: Create appointment schedule pages for external users to book available time slots
features.evidence_quote: Learn about appointment schedules in Google Calendar

features.name: appointment booking pages
features.description: Shareable public booking pages with availability rules for Standard+ plans
features.evidence_quote: Appointment booking pages

features.name: premium appointment features
features.description: Enhanced appointment scheduling features available on paid Workspace plans
features.evidence_quote: Compare premium features for appointment schedules

features.name: payment collection for appointments
features.description: Require payment from bookers when scheduling appointments through Calendar
features.evidence_quote: Require payments for appointments

features.name: email verification for appointments
features.description: Verify booker's email address before confirming appointment bookings
features.evidence_quote: Verify emails for appointments

features.name: find meeting times
features.description: View attendee availability overlay and suggest optimal meeting times across participants
features.evidence_quote: Find times to meet in Google Calendar

features.name: availability check across calendars
features.description: Check your own availability across multiple subscribed calendars before booking
features.evidence_quote: Check your availability across calendars

features.name: gemini ai scheduling assistant
features.description: AI-powered assistant inside Calendar that finds optimal meeting times and handles scheduling
features.evidence_quote: Let Gemini in Google Calendar find times to meet

features.name: room booking
features.description: Create and manage calendars for conference rooms and shared physical spaces
features.evidence_quote: Create a calendar for a room or shared space

features.name: event attachments
features.description: Attach files from Google Drive or other sources directly to calendar events
features.evidence_quote: Add attachments, rooms, or video conferencing to an event

features.name: video conferencing integration
features.description: Add Google Meet video conferencing links directly to calendar events
features.evidence_quote: Add attachments, rooms, or video conferencing to an event

features.name: recurring events
features.description: Create events that repeat on custom schedules (daily, weekly, monthly, custom)
features.evidence_quote: Manage repeating tasks in Google Tasks & Google Calendar

features.name: tasks integration
features.description: Create, view, and manage tasks directly within the Calendar interface
features.evidence_quote: Create & manage tasks in Google Calendar

features.name: repeating tasks
features.description: Create recurring tasks visible on the calendar alongside events
features.evidence_quote: Manage repeating tasks in Google Tasks & Google Calendar

features.name: family calendar
features.description: Shared family calendar for coordinating schedules across household members
features.evidence_quote: Use a family calendar on Google

features.name: birthday calendar
features.description: Automatic calendar that surfaces birthdays from Google Contacts
features.evidence_quote: Manage birthdays on your calendar

features.name: holiday calendars
features.description: Subscribe to regional public holiday calendars
features.evidence_quote: Add or remove holidays on your calendar

features.name: alternate calendars
features.description: Display alternate calendar systems (lunar, Hebrew, etc.) alongside the standard calendar
features.evidence_quote: Add or remove alternate calendars

features.name: public calendars
features.description: Create publicly accessible calendars anyone can view or subscribe to
features.evidence_quote: Create & manage a public Google calendar

features.name: calendar access control
features.description: Granular sharing permissions for calendars (view free/busy, view details, edit, manage)
features.evidence_quote: Control access to a shared calendar

features.name: calendar website embed
features.description: Embed a calendar widget into external websites via iframe
features.evidence_quote: Add a calendar to your website

features.name: calendar import
features.description: Import calendar data from external sources including .ics files
features.evidence_quote: Import events to Google Calendar

features.name: calendar export
features.description: Export calendar and event data for backup or migration to other platforms
features.evidence_quote: Export your data from Calendar, Reminders & Tasks

features.name: calendar transfer
features.description: Transfer calendars and events between Google accounts
features.evidence_quote: Transfer calendars or events in Google Calendar

features.name: ical/caldav sync
features.description: Sync Google Calendar with third-party apps via iCal and CalDAV protocols
features.evidence_quote: Sync your calendar with computer programs

features.name: apple calendar sync
features.description: Bi-directional sync between Google Calendar and Apple Calendar
features.evidence_quote: Add Google Calendar events to Apple Calendar

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Native mobile app for iOS and Android with full calendar access and sync
features.evidence_quote: Sync Calendar with a phone or tablet

features.name: wear os app
features.description: Google Calendar app for Wear OS smartwatches
features.evidence_quote: Use Google Calendar on your Wear OS watch

features.name: apple watch app
features.description: Google Calendar app for Apple Watch
features.evidence_quote: Use Google Calendar on your Apple Watch

features.name: gmail integration
features.description: Create events from Gmail; auto-extract event details from emails; manage events from inbox
features.evidence_quote: Schedule events in Gmail / Manage your events from Gmail

features.name: google chat integration
features.description: Create Google Meet meetings directly from Google Chat conversations
features.evidence_quote: Create a meeting in Google Chat

features.name: offline mode
features.description: View and edit calendar events without an active internet connection
features.evidence_quote: Use Google Calendar offline

features.name: dark theme
features.description: Dark mode visual theme for the calendar interface
features.evidence_quote: Use Dark theme in Calendar

features.name: accessibility
features.description: Full screen reader support and accessibility features

differentiators: Native integration with the full Google Workspace suite (Gmail, Drive, Meet, Chat, Tasks)
Gemini AI built in for natural-language meeting scheduling and time-finding
Cross-device coverage including Wear OS and Apple Watch smartwatches
Free consumer tier at no cost for personal use
Appointment booking pages with built-in payment collection (no third-party tool needed)
Unified personal and work calendar view across multiple Google accounts
Events auto-extracted from Gmail into Calendar automatically

recent_ships.what: Gemini AI integration inside Google Calendar for finding meeting times
recent_ships.source: Let Gemini in Google Calendar find times to meet

recent_ships.what: Payment collection requirement for appointment bookings
Apple Watch app for Google Calendar
recent_ships.source: Use Google Calendar on your Apple Watch

recent_ships.what: Major Calendar redesign ('A new day for Google Calendar')
recent_ships.source: HN: A new day for Google Calendar (357↑ 129c)

praised: Data portability: users value ability to download calendar data — top HN thread (628↑) on downloading Gmail/Calendar data
Deep Google ecosystem integration and ubiquity across devices
Cross-device accessibility; used on phones, computers, smartwatches
complaints: Privacy leaks: 'Google Calendar Unexpectedly Leaks Private Information' (287↑ HN)
Reliability concerns: 'Google Calendar Is Down' attracted 363↑ on HN
Cross-device compatibility issues: 'Can't sign in to Google calendar on my Samsung refrigerator' (454↑ HN)
Users seeking open-source alternatives: 'Ask HN: Is there a powerful open-source Google Calendar replacement?' (219↑ HN)

free_tier.limits: Unlimited personal calendar events; free for individual consumer use; no seat cap

tiers.name: Business Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 30GB pooled storage/user, custom email, Gemini in Gmail, Meet 100 participants, Google Vids

tiers.name: Business Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2TB pooled storage/user, Gemini in Gmail/Docs/Meet, Meet recording/noise cancel/150p, appointment booking, eSignature

tiers.name: Business Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5TB pooled storage/user, Meet 500p with attendance tracking, Vault, eDiscovery, Secure LDAP

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5TB+ storage, S/MIME, Meet 1000p with live streaming, DLP, context-aware access, data regions, Cloud Identity Premium

pricing.notes: Google Calendar is not sold standalone; it is bundled with all Google Workspace plans. Free consumer tier available at calendar.google.com separately. Starter/Standard/Plus capped at 300 users max; Enterprise has no user limit. Annual commitment saves ~16% vs monthly billing. Limited-time 50% off for first 3 months available to new customers as of mid-2026.
